name: Kailuan Energy Chemical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kailuan Energy Chemical Co.,Ltd. engages in coal, coal chemical, and other businesses. It engages in coal mining, raw coal washing, and processing; and coking and coal chemical product production and sales activities. The company was formerly known as Kailuan Coal Co., Ltd. Kailuan Energy Chemical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Tangshan, China.
